1<?php
2
3declare(strict_types=1);
4
5namespace Weline\Theme\Controller\Backend;
6
7use Weline\Framework\App\Controller\BackendController;
8use Weline\Framework\Http\Url;
9use Weline\Theme\Model\ThemeLayout;
10use Weline\Theme\Model\ThemeLayoutVersion;
11use Weline\Theme\Model\WelineTheme;
12use Weline\Framework\Manager\ObjectManager;
13use Weline\Theme\Service\EditorLockService;
14use Weline\Theme\Service\PreviewContextService;
15use Weline\Theme\Service\PreviewNavigationResolver;
16use Weline\Theme\Service\PreviewTokenService;
17use Weline\Theme\Service\SlotRendererService;
18use Weline\Theme\Service\ThemeCacheGenerator;
19use Weline\Theme\Service\ThemeContextService;
20use Weline\Theme\Service\ThemeLayoutService;
21use Weline\Theme\Service\ThemeLayoutVersionService;
22use Weline\Theme\Service\ThemePageTypeResolver;
23use Weline\Theme\Service\ThemePlaceableRegistry;
24use Weline\Theme\Service\ThemePreviewContentRenderer;
25use Weline\Theme\Service\WidgetPositionResolver;
26use Weline\Widget\Service\WidgetRegistry;
27use Weline\Theme\Helper\PreviewManager;
28use Weline\Theme\Helper\ThemeData;
29use Weline\Meta\Model\Meta;
30
31/**
32 * 主题编辑器控制器
33 */
34class ThemeEditor extends BackendController
35{
36    private WelineTheme $welineTheme;
37    private ThemeLayoutService $layoutService;
38    private ThemeLayoutVersionService $versionService;
39    private ThemeCacheGenerator $cacheGenerator;
40    private WidgetPositionResolver $positionResolver;
41    private WidgetRegistry $widgetRegistry;
42    private ThemeLayout $themeLayout;
43    private Meta $meta;
44    private PreviewTokenService $previewTokenService;
45    private EditorLockService $editorLockService;
46
47    public function __construct(
48        WelineTheme $welineTheme,
49        ThemeLayoutService $layoutService,
50        ThemeLayoutVersionService $versionService,
51        ThemeCacheGenerator $cacheGenerator,
52        WidgetPositionResolver $positionResolver,
53        WidgetRegistry $widgetRegistry,
54        ThemeLayout $themeLayout,
55        Meta $meta,
56        PreviewTokenService $previewTokenService,
57        EditorLockService $editorLockService
58    ) {
59        $this->welineTheme = $welineTheme;
60        $this->layoutService = $layoutService;
61        $this->versionService = $versionService;
62        $this->cacheGenerator = $cacheGenerator;
63        $this->positionResolver = $positionResolver;
64        $this->widgetRegistry = $widgetRegistry;
65        $this->themeLayout = $themeLayout;
66        $this->meta = $meta;
67        $this->previewTokenService = $previewTokenService;
68        $this->editorLockService = $editorLockService;
69    }
70
71    /**
72     * 清除全页面缓存（FPC）
73     * 发布主题后必须调用，否则前端仍然显示旧的缓存 HTML。
74     * 
75     * flush() 会自动触发 Weline_Framework_Cache::integration::cache_flushed 事件，
76     * Server 模块监听该事件并通知 WLS Worker 重载内存缓存，无需手动处理 WLS 通知。
77     */
78    /**
79     * 判断主题目录是否包含后端（backend）区域
80     * 无 backend 目录时可视化编辑仅用前端
81     */
82    private function themeHasBackendDir(WelineTheme $theme): bool
83    {
84        $themePath = $theme->getPath();
85        if ($themePath === '' || !is_dir($themePath)) {
86            return false;
87        }
88        $base = rtrim($themePath, \DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR);
89        $ds = \DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR;
90        return is_dir($base . $ds . 'view' . $ds . 'theme' . $ds . 'backend')
91            || is_dir($base . $ds . 'theme' . $ds . 'backend')
92            || is_dir($base . $ds . 'backend');
93    }
94
95    private function flushFullPageCache(): void
96    {
97        try {
98            $routerCache = \Weline\Framework\Manager\ObjectManager::getInstance(
99                \Weline\Framework\Router\Cache\RouterCache::class . 'Factory'
100            );
101            $routerCache->flush();
102        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
103            // FPC 清理失败不阻塞发布流程
104        }
105    }
106
107    /**
108     * 编辑器主页
109     */
110    public function index()
111    {
112        $previewContextService = $this->getPreviewContextService();
113        $themeContextService = $this->getThemeContextService();
114        $requestedThemeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('theme_id', 0);
115        $requestedFrontendThemeId = (int)$this->request->getParam(
116            'frontend_theme_id',
117            (int)$this->request->getParam('preview_theme', $requestedThemeId)
118        );
119        $requestedBackendThemeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('backend_theme_id', 0);
120        $pageType = (string)$this->request->getParam('page_type', ThemeLayout::PAGE_TYPE_HOME);
121        $editorArea = $previewContextService->normalizeArea(
122            (string)$this->request->getParam('editor_area', PreviewContextService::AREA_FRONTEND)
123        );
124        $themeListUrl = $this->_url->getBackendUrl('theme/backend');
125
126        $frontendTheme = $requestedFrontendThemeId > 0
127            ? $this->loadThemeModel($requestedFrontendThemeId)
128            : $themeContextService->resolveTheme(PreviewContextService::AREA_FRONTEND);
129        if (!$frontendTheme?->getId()) {
130            /*
131            $this->getMessageManager()->addError(__('绯荤粺娌℃湁鍙敤鐨勫墠绔富棰橈紝璇峰厛婵€娲绘垨閫夋嫨涓€涓墠绔富棰樸€?));
132            */
133            $this->getMessageManager()->addError(__('No available frontend theme. Please activate or select one first.'));
134            return $this->redirect($themeListUrl);
135        }
136
137        $frontendHasBackend = $this->themeHasBackendDir($frontendTheme);
138        $backendTheme = null;
139        if ($requestedBackendThemeId > 0) {
140            $candidateBackendTheme = $this->loadThemeModel($requestedBackendThemeId);
141            if ($candidateBackendTheme?->getId() && $themeContextService->themeSupportsArea($candidateBackendTheme, PreviewContextService::AREA_BACKEND)) {
142                $backendTheme = $candidateBackendTheme;
143            } else {
144                /*
145                $this->getMessageManager()->addWarning(__('鎵€閫夊悗鍙颁富棰樹笉鍙敤锛屽凡鑷姩鍥為€€鍒板綋鍓嶅惎鐢ㄧ殑鍚庡彴涓婚銆?));
146                */
147                $this->getMessageManager()->addWarning(__('Selected backend theme is unavailable, fallback to the active backend theme.'));
148            }
149        }
150        if (!$backendTheme?->getId() && $frontendHasBackend) {
151            $backendTheme = $this->loadThemeModel((int)$frontendTheme->getId());
152        }
153        if (!$backendTheme?->getId()) {
154            $backendTheme = $themeContextService->resolveTheme(PreviewContextService::AREA_BACKEND);
155        }
156        if (!$backendTheme?->getId() && $frontendHasBackend) {
157            $backendTheme = $this->loadThemeModel((int)$frontendTheme->getId());
158        }
159
160        $context = $previewContextService->buildContext([
161            'frontend_theme_id' => (int)$frontendTheme->getId(),
162            'backend_theme_id' => (int)($backendTheme?->getId() ?: 0),
163            'editor_area' => $editorArea,
164            'shell' => PreviewContextService::SHELL_THEME_EDITOR,
165            'preview_mode' => (string)$this->request->getParam('preview_mode', PreviewContextService::DEFAULT_PREVIEW_MODE),
166            'status' => (string)$this->request->getParam('status', PreviewContextService::DEFAULT_STATUS),
167            'version_id' => (int)$this->request->getParam('version_id', 0) ?: null,
168            'scope' => (string)$this->request->getParam('scope', PreviewContextService::DEFAULT_SCOPE),
169            'target_type' => PreviewContextService::TARGET_TYPE_LAYOUT,
170            'target_value' => $pageType,
171        ]);
172        $context = $previewContextService->ensureThemeIds($context, true, true);
173        if ($editorArea === PreviewContextService::AREA_BACKEND
174            && $previewContextService->getThemeIdForArea(PreviewContextService::AREA_BACKEND, $context, false) <= 0) {
175            $context['editor_area'] = PreviewContextService::AREA_FRONTEND;
176        }
177        $context = $previewContextService->persistContext($context);
178        $editorArea = (string)$context['editor_area'];
179        $frontendThemeId = $previewContextService->getThemeIdForArea(PreviewContextService::AREA_FRONTEND, $context, true);
180        $backendThemeId = $previewContextService->getThemeIdForArea(PreviewContextService::AREA_BACKEND, $context, true);
181        $currentThemeId = $previewContextService->getThemeIdForArea($editorArea, $context, true);
182        $currentTheme = $editorArea === PreviewContextService::AREA_BACKEND
183            ? ($backendTheme ?: $this->loadThemeModel($currentThemeId))
184            : ($frontendTheme ?: $this->loadThemeModel($currentThemeId));
185
186        $themesCollection = $this->welineTheme->reset()->select()->fetch()->getItems();
187        $themesById = [];
188        foreach ($themesCollection as $themeItem) {
189            $data = is_object($themeItem) ? $themeItem->getData() : (is_array($themeItem) ? $themeItem : []);
190            $tid = (int)($data['id'] ?? 0);
191            if ($tid && !isset($themesById[$tid])) {
192                $themesById[$tid] = $data + [
193                    'has_backend_area' => $this->themeRecordHasBackendArea($data),
194                ];
195            }
196        }
197        $themes = array_values($themesById);
198
199        $layout = [];
200        $hasDraft = false;
201        if ($currentThemeId) {
202            $hasDraft = $this->layoutService->hasDraft($currentThemeId, $pageType);
203            if (!$hasDraft) {
204                $this->layoutService->initDraftFromPublished($currentThemeId, $pageType);
205            }
206            $layout = $this->layoutService->getFullDraftLayout($currentThemeId, $pageType);
207        }
208
209        $availableWidgets = $this->layoutService->getAvailableWidgets(
210            $pageType,
211            $editorArea === PreviewContextService::AREA_BACKEND ? ['area' => PreviewContextService::AREA_BACKEND] : []
212        );
213        $availableWidgets = $this->attachWidgetPreviewHtml($availableWidgets);
214
215        $this->assign('theme_id', $currentThemeId);
216        $this->assign('theme', $currentTheme);
217        $this->assign('current_theme', $currentTheme);
218        $this->assign('frontend_theme', $frontendTheme);
219        $this->assign('backend_theme', $backendTheme);
220        $this->assign('frontend_theme_id', $frontendThemeId);
221        $this->assign('backend_theme_id', $backendThemeId);
222        $this->assign('themes', $themes);
223        $this->assign('page_type', $pageType);
224        $this->assign('page_types', ThemeLayout::getPageTypes());
225        $this->assign('areas', ThemeLayout::getAreas());
226        $this->assign('editor_area', $editorArea);
227        $this->assign('theme_has_backend', $frontendHasBackend || $backendThemeId > 0);
228        $this->assign('preview_context', $context);
229        $this->assign('layout', $layout);
230        $this->assign('available_widgets', $availableWidgets);
231        $this->assign('has_draft', $hasDraft);
232
233        return $this->fetch('Weline_Theme::templates/backend/ThemeEditor/index.phtml');
234    }
235
236    public function legacyIndex()
237    {
238        $requestedThemeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('theme_id', 0);
239        $pageType = $this->request->getParam('page_type', ThemeLayout::PAGE_TYPE_HOME);
240        $editorArea = (string)$this->request->getParam('editor_area', 'frontend');
241        $editorArea = $editorArea === 'backend' ? 'backend' : 'frontend';
242        
243        // 获取主题列表页面 URL（用于重定向）
244        $themeListUrl = $this->_url->getBackendUrl('theme/backend');
245
246        // 如果明确传入了 theme_id，必须验证其存在性
247        if ($requestedThemeId > 0) {
248            $this->welineTheme->reset()->load($requestedThemeId);
249            if (!$this->welineTheme->getId()) {
250                // 传入的主题 ID 不存在，报错并重定向到主题列表
251                $this->getMessageManager()->addError(__('主题 ID %{1} 不存在！请选择有效的主题。', $requestedThemeId));
252                return $this->redirect($themeListUrl);
253            }
254            $themeId = $requestedThemeId;
255        } else {
256            // 没有指定主题，尝试使用当前激活的主题
257            $activeTheme = $this->welineTheme->getActiveTheme($editorArea);
258            if ($activeTheme && $activeTheme->getId()) {
259                $themeId = (int)$activeTheme->getId();
260                $this->welineTheme->reset()->load($themeId);
261            } else {
262                // 没有激活的主题，报错并重定向到主题列表
263                $this->getMessageManager()->addError(__('系统没有激活的主题！请先选择或激活一个主题。'));
264                return $this->redirect($themeListUrl);
265            }
266        }
267        
268        // 双重检查：确保加载的主题有效
269        if (!$this->welineTheme->getId()) {
270            $this->getMessageManager()->addError(__('无法加载主题！请检查主题配置。'));
271            return $this->redirect($themeListUrl);
272        }
273        
274        // 获取所有主题列表（按 id 去重，避免重复显示）
275        $themesCollection = $this->welineTheme->reset()->select()->fetch()->getItems();
276        $themesById = [];
277        foreach ($themesCollection as $themeItem) {
278            $data = is_object($themeItem) ? $themeItem->getData() : (is_array($themeItem) ? $themeItem : []);
279            $tid = (int)($data['id'] ?? 0);
280            if ($tid && !isset($themesById[$tid])) {
281                $themesById[$tid] = $data;
282            }
283        }
284        $themes = array_values($themesById);
285
286        // 获取布局数据（编辑器读取草稿数据）
287        $layout = [];
288        $hasDraft = false;
289        if ($themeId) {
290            // 检查是否有草稿，如果没有则从已发布数据初始化草稿
291            $hasDraft = $this->layoutService->hasDraft($themeId, $pageType);
292            if (!$hasDraft) {
293                // 首次编辑，从已发布数据初始化草稿
294                $this->layoutService->initDraftFromPublished($themeId, $pageType);
295            }
296            // 读取草稿布局
297            $layout = $this->layoutService->getFullDraftLayout($themeId, $pageType);
298        }
299
300        // 获取可用部件列表
301        $availableWidgets = $this->layoutService->getAvailableWidgets();
302        // 预编译部件预览 HTML（用于部件库快速预览）
303        $availableWidgets = $this->attachWidgetPreviewHtml($availableWidgets);
304
305        // 页面类型列表
306        $pageTypes = ThemeLayout::getPageTypes();
307
308        // 区域列表
309        $areas = ThemeLayout::getAreas();
310
311        // 编辑区域：默认前端；若主题目录无 backend 则仅前端
312        $themeHasBackend = $this->themeHasBackendDir($this->welineTheme);
313        if (!$themeHasBackend || ($editorArea !== 'frontend' && $editorArea !== 'backend')) {
314            $editorArea = 'frontend';
315        }
316
317        $this->assign('theme_id', $themeId);
318        $this->assign('theme', $this->welineTheme);
319        $this->assign('themes', $themes);
320        $this->assign('page_type', $pageType);
321        $this->assign('page_types', $pageTypes);
322        $this->assign('areas', $areas);
323        $this->assign('editor_area', $editorArea);
324        $this->assign('theme_has_backend', $themeHasBackend);
325        $this->assign('layout', $layout);
326        $this->assign('available_widgets', $availableWidgets);
327        $this->assign('has_draft', $hasDraft);
328
329        return $this->fetch('Weline_Theme::templates/backend/ThemeEditor/index.phtml');
330    }
331
332    /**
333     * 获取布局数据 (AJAX) - 读取草稿数据
334     */
335    public function getLayout()
336    {
337        $themeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('theme_id');
338        $pageType = $this->request->getParam('page_type', ThemeLayout::PAGE_TYPE_HOME);
339
340        if (!$themeId) {
341            return $this->fetchJson([
342                'success' => false,
343                'message' => __('请选择主题'),
344            ]);
345        }
346        
347        // 验证主题是否存在
348        $this->welineTheme->reset()->load($themeId);
349        if (!$this->welineTheme->getId()) {
350            return $this->fetchJson([
351                'success' => false,
352                'message' => __('主题 ID %{1} 不存在', $themeId),
353            ]);
354        }
355
356        // 检查是否有草稿，如果没有则从已发布数据初始化
357        if (!$this->layoutService->hasDraft($themeId, $pageType)) {
358            $this->layoutService->initDraftFromPublished($themeId, $pageType);
359        }
360
361        // 读取草稿布局
362        $layout = $this->layoutService->getFullDraftLayout($themeId, $pageType);
363
364        return $this->fetchJson([
365            'success' => true,
366            'data' => $layout,
367            'has_draft' => $this->layoutService->hasDraft($themeId, $pageType),
368        ]);
369    }
370
371    /**
372     * 获取部件列表 (AJAX)
373     * 
374     * 参数：
375     * - page_type: 页面类型（可选），用于过滤部件
376     */
377    public function getWidgets()
378    {
379        $pageType = $this->request->getParam('page_type', null);
380        $filterOptions = ['area' => 'backend'];
381
382        $widgets = $this->layoutService->getAvailableWidgets($pageType, $filterOptions);
383
384        return $this->fetchJson([
385            'success' => true,
386            'data' => $widgets,
387            'page_type' => $pageType,
388        ]);
389    }
390    
391    /**
392     * 获取指定 slot 的推荐部件 (AJAX)
393     * 
394     * 精细筛选逻辑：
395     * - 顶层独占区域（header/footer）：返回独占大部件
396     * - 子 slot（logo/search 等）：返回匹配该 slot 的小部件
397     * - content 区域：返回所有适用的部件（非独占）
398     * 
399     * 参数：
400     * - slot_id: slot ID（必填）
401     * - area: 区域代码（可选，如 header/content/footer）
402     * - page_type: 页面类型（可选）
403     */
404    public function getWidgetsForSlot()
405    {
406        $slotId = $this->request->getParam('slot_id', '');
407        $area = $this->request->getParam('area', null);
408        $pageType = $this->request->getParam('page_type', null);
409        
410        if (empty($slotId)) {
411            return $this->fetchJson([
412                'success' => false,
413                'message' => __('缺少 slot_id 参数'),
414            ]);
415        }
416        
417        // 获取精细筛选的部件
418        $result = $this->layoutService->getWidgetsForSlot($slotId, $area, $pageType);
419        
420        // 预编译预览 HTML
421        if (!empty($result['exclusive_widgets'])) {
422            foreach ($result['exclusive_widgets'] as &$widget) {
423                $widget['preview_html'] = $this->buildWidgetPreviewHtml($widget);
424            }
425        }
426        if (!empty($result['regular_widgets'])) {
427            foreach ($result['regular_widgets'] as &$widget) {
428                $widget['preview_html'] = $this->buildWidgetPreviewHtml($widget);
429            }
430        }
431        if (!empty($result['matched_widgets'])) {
432            foreach ($result['matched_widgets'] as &$widget) {
433                $widget['preview_html'] = $this->buildWidgetPreviewHtml($widget);
434            }
435        }
436        
437        return $this->fetchJson([
438            'success' => true,
439            'data' => $result,
440        ]);
441    }
442
443    /**
444     * 保存部件 (AJAX)
445     */
446    public function postSaveWidget()
447    {
448        // 优先从请求体获取 JSON 数据
449        $bodyParams = $this->request->getBodyParams();
450        
451        if (is_string($bodyParams)) {
452            $decoded = json_decode($bodyParams, true);
453            $data = ($decoded !== null && is_array($decoded)) ? $decoded : $this->request->getParams();
454        } elseif (is_array($bodyParams) && !empty($bodyParams)) {
455            $data = $bodyParams;
456        } else {
457            $data = $this->request->getParams();
458        }
459
460        // 缺失时从 getParam 补全
461        $keys = ['theme_id', 'area', 'widget_code', 'widget_module', 'widget_type', 'page_type', 'slot_id', 'config'];
462        foreach ($keys as $key) {
463            $empty = !isset($data[$key]) || $data[$key] === '' || $data[$key] === null;
464            if ($key === 'theme_id') {
465                $empty = $empty || (int)($data[$key] ?? 0) === 0;
466            }
467            if ($empty) {
468                $v = $this->request->getParam($key);
469                if ($v !== '' && $v !== null && ($key !== 'theme_id' || (int)$v > 0)) {
470                    $data[$key] = $key === 'theme_id' ? (int)$v : $v;
471                }
472            }
473        }
474
475        if (empty($data['theme_id']) || empty($data['area']) || empty($data['widget_code'])) {
476            return $this->fetchJson([
477                'success' => false,
478                'message' => __('参数不完整'),
479            ]);
480        }
481
482        // 如果 area 不是标准区域，则视为自定义插槽，根据插槽名推断实际所属区域
483        $area = $data['area'];
484        if (!array_key_exists($area, ThemeLayout::getAreas())) {
485            $data['slot_id'] = $data['slot_id'] ?? $area;
486            // 根据插槽名或部件类型推断实际区域
487            $data['area'] = $this->inferAreaFromSlot($area, $data['widget_type'] ?? '', $data['widget_code']);
488        }
489
490        // 检查位置是否允许（对于已通过前端插槽验证的部件，跳过后端区域限制检查）
491        // 前端已根据 slot accept/reject 规则验证过，后端只做基本校验
492        $slotId = $data['slot_id'] ?? null;
493        $skipAreaCheck = !empty($slotId); // 有明确插槽时跳过区域检查
494        if (!$skipAreaCheck && !$this->positionResolver->canPlaceInArea($data['widget_module'] ?? '', $data['widget_code'], $data['area'])) {
495            return $this->fetchJson([
496                'success' => false,
497                'message' => __('该部件不能放置在此区域'),
498            ]);
499        }
500
501        // 处理独占插槽参数
502        // slot_id: 插槽ID（如 logo, search, user-area 等）
503        // exclusive: 是否独占（true 表示替换现有部件）
504        $data['slot_id'] = $data['slot_id'] ?? null;
505        
506        // 后端兜底：如果 exclusive 未传或为 null，根据 slot_id 自动判断是否独占
507        // 与模板 exclusive="true" / data-wslot-exclusive="true" 保持一致
508        // 注意：user-area（多个图标）和 footer-links（多个链接组）是 multiple，不是 exclusive
509        $exclusiveSlots = [
510            // Header 区域
511            'header', 'logo', 'search', 'navigation',
512            // Footer 区域
513            'footer', 'footer-social', 'footer-copyright',
514            // Content 容器
515            'widget-hero',
516            // 产品列表页
517            'list-grid', 'list-pagination',
518        ];
519        $slotId = $data['slot_id'];
520        $passedExclusive = $data['exclusive'] ?? null;
521        if ($passedExclusive === null || $passedExclusive === '') {
522            // 未传递 exclusive，根据 slot_id 自动判断
523            $data['exclusive'] = $slotId && in_array($slotId, $exclusiveSlots, true);
524        } else {
525            $data['exclusive'] = (bool)$passedExclusive;
526        }
527
528        try {
529            $layoutId = $this->layoutService->saveWidget($data);
530
531            $response = [
532                'success' => true,
533                'message' => __('保存成功'),
534                'data' => ['layout_id' => $layoutId],
535            ];
536
537            // T010: 保存成功后返回 preview_html
538            $previewHtml = $this->buildPreviewHtmlForLayoutId($layoutId, $data['config'] ?? []);
539            if ($previewHtml !== null) {
540                $response['preview_html'] = $previewHtml;
541            }
542
543            return $this->fetchJson($response);
544        } catch (\Exception $e) {
545            return $this->fetchJson([
546                'success' => false,
547                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
548            ]);
549        }
550    }
551
552    /**
553     * 更新部件配置 (AJAX)
554     */
555    public function postUpdateConfig()
556    {
557        // 优先从请求体获取 JSON 数据
558        $bodyParams = $this->request->getBodyParams();
559        
560        // 如果 bodyParams 是字符串，尝试解析为 JSON
561        if (is_string($bodyParams)) {
562            $decoded = json_decode($bodyParams, true);
563            if ($decoded !== null && is_array($decoded)) {
564                $data = $decoded;
565            } else {
566                $data = $this->request->getParams();
567            }
568        } elseif (is_array($bodyParams) && !empty($bodyParams)) {
569            // 如果 bodyParams 是数组且不为空，使用它
570            $data = $bodyParams;
571        } else {
572            // 回退到 getParams
573            $data = $this->request->getParams();
574        }
575
576        $layoutId = (int)($data['layout_id'] ?? $this->request->getParam('layout_id', 0));
577        $config = $data['config'] ?? $this->request->getParam('config', []);
578
579        if (!$layoutId) {
580            return $this->fetchJson([
581                'success' => false,
582                'message' => __('缺少布局ID'),
583            ]);
584        }
585
586        try {
587            $result = $this->layoutService->updateWidgetConfig($layoutId, $config);
588
589            $response = [
590                'success' => $result,
591                'message' => $result ? __('配置已保存') : __('保存失败'),
592            ];
593
594            // T009: 配置保存成功后返回 preview_html
595            if ($result) {
596                $previewHtml = $this->buildPreviewHtmlForLayoutId($layoutId, $config);
597                if ($previewHtml !== null) {
598                    $response['preview_html'] = $previewHtml;
599                }
600            }
601
602            return $this->fetchJson($response);
603        } catch (\Exception $e) {
604            return $this->fetchJson([
605                'success' => false,
606                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
607            ]);
608        }
609    }
610
611    /**
612     * 删除部件 (AJAX)
613     * 路由: /backend/theme-editor/remove-widget (POST)
614     */
615    public function postRemoveWidget()
616    {
617        $bodyParams = $this->request->getBodyParams();
618        if (is_string($bodyParams)) {
619            $data = json_decode($bodyParams, true) ?: [];
620        } elseif (is_array($bodyParams)) {
621            $data = $bodyParams;
622        } else {
623            $data = [];
624        }
625        
626        $layoutId = (int)($data['layout_id'] ?? $this->request->getParam('layout_id', 0));
627        $themeId = (int)($data['theme_id'] ?? $this->request->getParam('theme_id', 0));
628
629        if (!$layoutId) {
630            return $this->fetchJson([
631                'success' => false,
632                'message' => __('缺少布局ID'),
633            ]);
634        }
635
636        try {
637            // 获取要删除的部件信息（在删除前）。不对 clearQuery() 链式调用 load()，避免 clearQuery() 返回 Query 时在 Query 上调用 load() 导致致命错误。
638            $this->themeLayout->load($layoutId);
639            $widget = $this->themeLayout;
640            $slotId = $widget->getData('slot_id');
641            $pageType = $widget->getData('page_type');
642            $area = $widget->getData('area');
643            
644            // 如果 DB 记录不存在，使用前端提供的 fallback 数据
645            $recordExists = !empty($widget->getLayoutId());
646            if (!$recordExists) {
647                $slotId = $data['slot_id'] ?? null;
648                $area = $data['area'] ?? 'content';
649                $pageType = $data['layout_type'] ?? 'homepage';
650            }
651            
652            // 尝试删除部件（如果记录存在）
653            $result = $recordExists ? $this->layoutService->deleteWidget($layoutId) : true;
654            
655            // 删除后清除插槽渲染缓存，否则 getOriginalSlotContent 会读到旧 layout 缓存，返回仍含已删部件的内容
656            if ($result) {
657                ObjectManager::getInstance(SlotRendererService::class)->clearCache();
658            }
659            
660            $response = [
661                'success' => $result,
662                'message' => $result ? __('删除成功') : __('删除失败'),
663                'slot_id' => $slotId,
664            ];
665            
666            // 获取插槽的原始内容（无论记录是否存在，只要有足够信息就尝试恢复）
667            if ($result && $themeId && $slotId) {
668                $layoutType = $data['layout_type'] ?? $this->request->getParam('layout_type', 'homepage');
669                $layoutOption = $data['layout_option'] ?? $this->request->getParam('layout_option', 'default');
670                $originalHtml = $this->getOriginalSlotContent($themeId, $pageType, $slotId, $area, $layoutType, $layoutOption);
671                $response['original_html'] = $originalHtml;
672                $response['has_original'] = !empty($originalHtml);
673            }
674            
675            return $this->fetchJson($response);
676        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
677            return $this->fetchJson([
678                'success' => false,
679                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
680            ]);
681        }
682    }
683
684    /**
685     * 批量删除孤儿部件（找不到插槽的部件）
686     * 路由: /backend/theme-editor/remove-orphan-widgets (POST)
687     */
688    public function postRemoveOrphanWidgets()
689    {
690        // 获取 JSON 请求体
691        $bodyParams = $this->request->getBodyParams();
692        
693        if (is_string($bodyParams)) {
694            $decoded = json_decode($bodyParams, true);
695            $data = ($decoded !== null && is_array($decoded)) ? $decoded : $this->request->getParams();
696        } elseif (is_array($bodyParams) && !empty($bodyParams)) {
697            $data = $bodyParams;
698        } else {
699            $data = $this->request->getParams();
700        }
701        
702        $themeId = (int)($data['theme_id'] ?? $this->request->getParam('theme_id', 0));
703        $slotIds = $data['slot_ids'] ?? $this->request->getParam('slot_ids', []);
704        $pageType = (string)($data['page_type']
705            ?? $this->request->getParam('page_type', $this->request->getParam('layout_type', ThemeLayout::PAGE_TYPE_HOME)));
706        $status = (string)($data['status'] ?? $this->request->getParam('status', ThemeLayout::STATUS_DRAFT));
707        if ($status !== ThemeLayout::STATUS_DRAFT && $status !== ThemeLayout::STATUS_PUBLISHED) {
708            $status = ThemeLayout::STATUS_DRAFT;
709        }
710        
711        if (!$themeId || empty($slotIds)) {
712            return $this->fetchJson([
713                'success' => false,
714                'message' => __('参数不完整'),
715            ]);
716        }
717        
718        try {
719            $deletedCount = 0;
720            
721            // 批量删除指定插槽的所有部件（包括 draft 和 published）
722            foreach ($slotIds as $slotId) {
723
724                // 先验证目标数据存在
725                $existsBefore = $this->themeLayout->clearQuery()
726                    ->where('theme_id', $themeId)
727                    ->where('page_type', $pageType)
728                    ->where('status', $status)
729                    ->where('slot_id', $slotId)
730                    ->select()
731                    ->fetchArray();
732
733
734                $this->themeLayout->clearQuery()
735                    ->where('theme_id', $themeId)
736                    ->where('page_type', $pageType)
737                    ->where('status', $status)
738                    ->where('slot_id', $slotId)
739                    ->delete()
740                    ->fetch();
741
742                // 验证删除后是否还存在
743                $existsAfter = $this->themeLayout->clearQuery()
744                    ->where('theme_id', $themeId)
745                    ->where('page_type', $pageType)
746                    ->where('status', $status)
747                    ->where('slot_id', $slotId)
748                    ->select()
749                    ->fetchArray();
750
751                    
752                $deletedCount += \count($existsBefore);
753            }
754            
755            if ($deletedCount > 0) {
756                return $this->fetchJson([
757                    'success' => true,
758                    'message' => __('已删除 %{count} 个孤儿部件', ['count' => $deletedCount]),
759                    'deleted_count' => $deletedCount,
760                ]);
761            } else {
762                return $this->fetchJson([
763                    'success' => false,
764                    'message' => __('未找到需要删除的孤儿部件（可能已被删除）'),
765                    'deleted_count' => 0,
766                ]);
767            }
768        } catch (\Exception $e) {
769            return $this->fetchJson([
770                'success' => false,
771                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
772            ]);
773        }
774    }
775
776    /**
777     * 移动部件 (AJAX)
778     */
779    public function postMoveWidget()
780    {
781        $layoutId = (int)$this->request->getParam('layout_id');
782        $newArea = $this->request->getParam('area');
783        $sortOrder = (int)$this->request->getParam('sort_order', 0);
784
785        if (!$layoutId || !$newArea) {
786            return $this->fetchJson([
787                'success' => false,
788                'message' => __('参数不完整'),
789            ]);
790        }
791
792        try {
793            $result = $this->layoutService->moveWidget($layoutId, $newArea, $sortOrder);
794
795            return $this->fetchJson([
796                'success' => $result,
797                'message' => $result ? __('移动成功') : __('移动失败'),
798            ]);
799        } catch (\Exception $e) {
800            return $this->fetchJson([
801                'success' => false,
802                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
803            ]);
804        }
805    }
806
807    /**
808     * 更新排序 (AJAX)
809     */
810    public function postUpdateSort()
811    {
812        // 尝试从 JSON body 获取参数
813        $bodyParams = $this->request->getBodyParams();
814        $body = is_array($bodyParams) ? $bodyParams : (is_string($bodyParams) ? json_decode($bodyParams, true) : null);
815        $sortData = $body['sort_data'] ?? $this->request->getParam('sort_data', []);
816
817        if (empty($sortData)) {
818            return $this->fetchJson([
819                'success' => false,
820                'message' => __('排序数据为空'),
821            ]);
822        }
823
824        try {
825            $result = $this->layoutService->updateSortOrder($sortData);
826
827            return $this->fetchJson([
828                'success' => $result,
829                'message' => $result ? __('排序已更新') : __('更新失败'),
830            ]);
831        } catch (\Exception $e) {
832            return $this->fetchJson([
833                'success' => false,
834                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
835            ]);
836        }
837    }
838
839    /**
840     * 交换两个部件的排序 (AJAX)
841     */
842    public function postSwapWidgetOrder()
843    {
844        // 尝试从 JSON body 获取参数
845        $bodyParams = $this->request->getBodyParams();
846        $body = is_array($bodyParams) ? $bodyParams : (is_string($bodyParams) ? json_decode($bodyParams, true) : null);
847        $themeId = (int)($body['theme_id'] ?? $this->request->getParam('theme_id'));
848        $layoutId1 = (int)($body['layout_id_1'] ?? $this->request->getParam('layout_id_1'));
849        $layoutId2 = (int)($body['layout_id_2'] ?? $this->request->getParam('layout_id_2'));
850
851        if (!$layoutId1 || !$layoutId2) {
852            return $this->fetchJson([
853                'success' => false,
854                'message' => __('参数不完整'),
855            ]);
856        }
857
858        try {
859            $result = $this->layoutService->swapWidgetOrder($layoutId1, $layoutId2);
860
861            return $this->fetchJson([
862                'success' => $result,
863                'message' => $result ? __('位置已交换') : __('交换失败'),
864            ]);
865        } catch (\Exception $e) {
866            return $this->fetchJson([
867                'success' => false,
868                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
869            ]);
870        }
871    }
872
873    /**
874     * 保存完整布局 (AJAX)
875     */
876    public function postSaveLayout()
877    {
878        $themeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('theme_id');
879        $pageType = $this->request->getParam('page_type', ThemeLayout::PAGE_TYPE_HOME);
880        $layoutData = $this->request->getParam('layout_data', []);
881
882        if (!$themeId) {
883            return $this->fetchJson([
884                'success' => false,
885                'message' => __('请选择主题'),
886            ]);
887        }
888
889        try {
890            $result = $this->layoutService->saveLayout($themeId, $pageType, $layoutData);
891
892            return $this->fetchJson([
893                'success' => $result,
894                'message' => $result ? __('布局已保存') : __('保存失败'),
895            ]);
896        } catch (\Exception $e) {
897            return $this->fetchJson([
898                'success' => false,
899                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
900            ]);
901        }
902    }
903
904    /**
905     * 获取部件位置信息 (AJAX)
906     */
907    public function getPlacementInfo()
908    {
909        $widgetModule = $this->request->getParam('widget_module');
910        $widgetCode = $this->request->getParam('widget_code');
911
912        if (!$widgetModule || !$widgetCode) {
913            return $this->fetchJson([
914                'success' => false,
915                'message' => __('参数不完整'),
916            ]);
917        }
918
919        $info = $this->positionResolver->getPlacementInfo($widgetModule, $widgetCode);
920
921        return $this->fetchJson([
922            'success' => true,
923            'data' => $info,
924        ]);
925    }
926
927    /**
928     * 恢复原始布局（旧 API - 已废弃，保留兼容性）
929     * 
930     * @deprecated 使用 postRestoreOriginal() 代替，支持版本控制和自动备份
931     */
932    public function postRestoreLayout()
933    {
934        // 委托给新的恢复原始布局 API
935        return $this->postRestoreOriginal();
936    }
937
938    public function postPublish()
939    {
940        $themeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('theme_id');
941        $pageType = $this->request->getParam('page_type'); // 可选，null表示发布所有页面类型
942
943        if (!$themeId) {
944            return $this->fetchJson([
945                'success' => false,
946                'message' => __('请选择主题'),
947            ]);
948        }
949
950        try {
951            // 1. 发布前清理：删除草稿中的孤儿部件（slot_id 指向不存在的插槽）
952            $orphansCleaned = $this->layoutService->cleanOrphanWidgets($themeId, $pageType);
953            
954            // 2. 将草稿发布为正式版（复制 draft -> published，含去重）
955            $publishResult = $this->layoutService->publishLayout($themeId, $pageType);
956            if (!$publishResult) {
957                return $this->fetchJson([
958                    'success' => false,
959                    'message' => __('发布布局失败'),
960                ]);
961            }
962
963            // 3. 清除旧缓存（主题生成缓存）
964            $this->cacheGenerator->clearCache($themeId);
965
966            // 4. 清除全页面缓存（FPC）— 布局变更后旧的缓存 HTML 必须失效
967            $this->flushFullPageCache();
968
969            // 5. 生成新缓存
970            $cacheResult = $this->cacheGenerator->generate($themeId);
971
972            $message = $cacheResult ? __('主题已发布') : __('生成缓存失败，但布局已发布');
973            if ($orphansCleaned > 0) {
974                $message .= ' ' . __('（已清理 %{count} 个无效部件）', ['count' => $orphansCleaned]);
975            }
976
977            return $this->fetchJson([
978                'success' => $cacheResult,
979                'message' => $message,
980            ]);
981        } catch (\Exception $e) {
982            return $this->fetchJson([
983                'success' => false,
984                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
985            ]);
986        }
987    }
988
989    /**
990     * 撤销草稿 (AJAX) - 放弃所有未发布的修改
991     */
992    public function postDiscardDraft()
993    {
994        $themeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('theme_id');
995        $pageType = $this->request->getParam('page_type'); // 可选
996
997        if (!$themeId) {
998            return $this->fetchJson([
999                'success' => false,
1000                'message' => __('请选择主题'),
1001            ]);
1002        }
1003
1004        try {
1005            $result = $this->layoutService->discardDraft($themeId, $pageType);
1006
1007            return $this->fetchJson([
1008                'success' => $result,
1009                'message' => $result ? __('草稿已撤销') : __('撤销失败'),
1010            ]);
1011        } catch (\Exception $e) {
1012            return $this->fetchJson([
1013                'success' => false,
1014                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
1015            ]);
1016        }
1017    }
1018
1019    /**
1020     * 预览页面 - 读取草稿数据进行预览
1021     */
1022    public function preview()
1023    {
1024        $themeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('theme_id');
1025        $pageType = $this->request->getParam('page_type', ThemeLayout::PAGE_TYPE_HOME);
1026
1027        if (!$themeId) {
1028            return $this->fetch('Weline_Theme::templates/backend/ThemeEditor/preview-empty.phtml');
1029        }
1030
1031        // 获取草稿布局数据
1032        $layout = $this->layoutService->getFullDraftLayout($themeId, $pageType);
1033
1034        $this->assign('theme_id', $themeId);
1035        $this->assign('page_type', $pageType);
1036        $this->assign('layout', $layout);
1037        $this->assign('areas', ThemeLayout::getAreas());
1038        $this->assign('preview_mode', true); // 标记为预览模式
1039
1040        return $this->fetch('Weline_Theme::templates/backend/ThemeEditor/preview.phtml');
1041    }
1042
1043    /**
1044     * 渲染单个部件 (AJAX) - 用于实时预览
1045     * 
1046     * 支持两种调用方式：
1047     * 1. 通过 widget_module + widget_code 查找部件定义并渲染
1048     * 2. 通过 layout_id 获取已保存部件的配置并渲染
1049     */
1050    public function postRenderWidget()
1051    {
1052        // 获取请求参数
1053        $bodyParams = $this->request->getBodyParams();
1054        if (is_string($bodyParams)) {
1055            $data = json_decode($bodyParams, true);
1056            if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
1057                $data = $this->request->getParams();
1058            }
1059        } elseif (is_array($bodyParams) && !empty($bodyParams)) {
1060            $data = $bodyParams;
1061        } else {
1062            $data = $this->request->getParams();
1063        }
1064
1065        $layoutId = (int)($data['layout_id'] ?? 0);
1066        $widgetModule = $data['widget_module'] ?? '';
1067        $widgetCode = $data['widget_code'] ?? '';
1068        $config = $data['config'] ?? [];
1069
1070        // 如果提供了 layout_id，从数据库获取配置
1071        if ($layoutId) {
1072            $layoutData = $this->layoutService->getWidgetByLayoutId($layoutId);
1073            if ($layoutData) {
1074                $widgetModule = $layoutData['widget_module'] ?? $widgetModule;
1075                $widgetCode = $layoutData['widget_code'] ?? $widgetCode;
1076                // 合并配置（传入的配置优先，用于预览配置变更）
1077                $savedConfig = $layoutData['config'] ?? [];
1078                $config = array_merge($savedConfig, $config);
1079            }
1080        }
1081
1082        if (!$widgetModule || !$widgetCode) {
1083            return $this->fetchJson([
1084                'success' => false,
1085                'message' => __('缺少部件模块或代码'),
1086            ]);
1087        }
1088
1089        $eventData = [
1090            'data' => [
1091                'operation' => 'preview',
1092                'params' => [
1093                    'widget_module' => $widgetModule,
1094                    'widget_code' => $widgetCode,
1095                    'config' => $config,
1096                    'area' => 'frontend',
1097                ],
1098            ],
1099        ];
1100        $this->getEventManager()->dispatch('Weline_Widget::query', $eventData);
1101        $html = $eventData['data']['result'] ?? '';
1102        $err = $eventData['data']['error'] ?? null;
1103        if ($err !== null && $err !== '') {
1104            return $this->fetchJson([
1105                'success' => false,
1106                'message' => $err,
1107            ]);
1108        }
1109        $widgetMeta = $this->findWidgetMetaByModuleAndCode($widgetModule, $widgetCode);
1110        return $this->fetchJson([
1111            'success' => true,
1112            'html' => is_string($html) ? $html : '',
1113            'widget' => [
1114                'code' => $widgetCode,
1115                'module' => $widgetModule,
1116                'name' => $widgetMeta['name'] ?? $widgetCode,
1117                'slot' => $widgetMeta['slot'] ?? null,
1118                'is_container' => $widgetMeta['is_container'] ?? false,
1119            ],
1120        ]);
1121    }
1122
1123    /**
1124     * 获取部件默认预览 (GET) - 用于拖拽时的预览
1125     */
1126    public function getWidgetPreview()
1127    {
1128        $widgetModule = $this->request->getParam('widget_module', '');
1129        $widgetCode = $this->request->getParam('widget_code', '');
1130
1131        if (!$widgetModule || !$widgetCode) {
1132            return $this->fetchJson([
1133                'success' => false,
1134                'message' => __('缺少部件参数'),
1135            ]);
1136        }
1137
1138        $widgetMeta = $this->findWidgetMetaByModuleAndCode($widgetModule, $widgetCode);
1139        if (!$widgetMeta) {
1140            return $this->fetchJson([
1141                'success' => false,
1142                'message' => __('部件不存在'),
1143            ]);
1144        }
1145
1146        $eventData = [
1147            'data' => [
1148                'operation' => 'preview',
1149                'params' => [
1150                    'widget_module' => $widgetModule,
1151                    'widget_code' => $widgetCode,
1152                    'config' => [],
1153                    'area' => 'frontend',
1154                ],
1155            ],
1156        ];
1157        $this->getEventManager()->dispatch('Weline_Widget::query', $eventData);
1158        $html = $eventData['data']['result'] ?? '';
1159        $err = $eventData['data']['error'] ?? null;
1160        if ($err !== null && $err !== '') {
1161            return $this->fetchJson([
1162                'success' => true,
1163                'html' => '<div class="widget-preview-error">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$err) . '</div>',
1164                'widget' => $widgetMeta,
1165            ]);
1166        }
1167        return $this->fetchJson([
1168            'success' => true,
1169            'html' => is_string($html) ? $html : '<div class="widget-preview-placeholder">' . htmlspecialchars((string)($widgetMeta['name'] ?? $widgetCode ?? '')) . '</div>',
1170            'widget' => $widgetMeta,
1171        ]);
1172    }
1173
1174    /**
1175     * 获取已安装语言列表（含 SVG 国旗）
1176     *
1177     * 通过 Weline_I18n::query 查询器获取，由 I18n 模块统一提供。
1178     *
1179     * @return array JSON 响应 { success, locales: [ { code, name, flag }, ... ] }
1180     */
1181    public function getInstalledLocales()
1182    {
1183        $eventData = [
1184            'data' => [
1185                'operation' => 'getInstalledLocales',
1186                'params' => [],
1187            ],
1188        ];
1189        $this->getEventManager()->dispatch('Weline_I18n::query', $eventData);
1190
1191        $error = $eventData['data']['error'] ?? '';
1192        if ($error !== '') {
1193            return $this->fetchJson([
1194                'success' => false,
1195                'message' => $error,
1196                'locales' => [],
1197            ]);
1198        }
1199
1200        $locales = $eventData['data']['result'] ?? [];
1201        if (!is_array($locales)) {
1202            $locales = [];
1203        }
1204
1205        return $this->fetchJson([
1206            'success' => true,
1207            'locales' => $locales,
1208        ]);
1209    }
1210
1211    /**
1212     * 获取部件配置信息 (GET)
1213     * 
1214     * 支持多语言：传递 locale 参数获取特定语言的配置值
1215     * 
1216     * @return array JSON响应
1217     */
1218    public function getWidgetConfig()
1219    {
1220        $layoutId = (int)$this->request->getParam('layout_id', 0);
1221        $locale = $this->request->getParam('locale', null); // null表示默认语言
1222        
1223        if (!$layoutId) {
1224            return $this->fetchJson([
1225                'success' => false,
1226                'message' => __('缺少布局ID'),
1227            ]);
1228        }
1229        
1230        // 查询部件信息
1231        $widgetLayout = $this->themeLayout->reset()->load($layoutId);
1232        
1233        if (!$widgetLayout->getLayoutId()) {
1234            return $this->fetchJson([
1235                'success' => false,
1236                'message' => __('部件不存在'),
1237            ]);
1238        }
1239        
1240        $widgetModule = $widgetLayout->getData('widget_module');
1241        $widgetCode = $widgetLayout->getData('widget_code');
1242        $widgetType = $widgetLayout->getData('widget_type') ?: '';
1243        $area = $widgetLayout->getData('area') ?: 'frontend';
1244        
1245        // 通过 Weline_Widget::query 获取参数定义
1246        $eventData = [
1247            'data' => [
1248                'operation' => 'getParamDefinitions',
1249                'params' => [
1250                    'widget_module' => $widgetModule,
1251                    'widget_code' => $widgetCode,
1252                    'area' => $area,
1253                ],
1254            ],
1255        ];
1256        $this->getEventManager()->dispatch('Weline_Widget::query', $eventData);
1257        $params = $eventData['data']['result'] ?? [];
1258        if (!is_array($params)) {
1259            $params = [];
1260        }
1261        if (empty($params)) {
1262            return $this->fetchJson([
1263                'success' => false,
1264                'message' => __('该部件没有配置项'),
1265            ]);
1266        }
1267        
1268        $identify = $this->resolveThemeConfigIdentify($widgetModule, $widgetType, $widgetCode, $area);
1269
1270        // 以 layout 已保存配置为 base（保证选择器等非翻译字段刷新后回填正确）
1271        $config = $widgetLayout->getWidgetConfig();
1272        if (!is_array($config)) {
1273            $config = [];
1274        }
1275
1276        // 按 locale 合并可翻译路径（顶级 + 数组子字段）到 base
1277        $config = ThemeData::mergeTranslatedPaths($config, $params, $identify, $locale);
1278
1279        return $this->fetchJson([
1280            'success' => true,
1281            'data' => [
1282                'layout_id' => $layoutId,
1283                'widget_module' => $widgetModule,
1284                'widget_type' => $widgetType,
1285                'widget_code' => $widgetCode,
1286                'params' => $params,
1287                'config' => $config,
1288                'locale' => $locale,
1289            ],
1290        ]);
1291    }
1292    
1293    /**
1294     * 保存部件配置 (POST)
1295     * 
1296     * 支持多语言：传递 locale 参数保存特定语言的配置值
1297     * 
1298     * @return array JSON响应
1299     */
1300    public function postSaveWidgetConfig()
1301    {
1302        $layoutId = (int)$this->request->getParam('layout_id', 0);
1303        $configData = $this->request->getParam('config', []);
1304        $locale = $this->request->getParam('locale', null); // null表示保存为默认值
1305        
1306        if (!$layoutId) {
1307            return $this->fetchJson([
1308                'success' => false,
1309                'message' => __('缺少布局ID'),
1310            ]);
1311        }
1312        
1313        if (!is_array($configData)) {
1314            return $this->fetchJson([
1315                'success' => false,
1316                'message' => __('配置数据格式错误'),
1317            ]);
1318        }
1319        
1320        // 获取部件信息
1321        $widgetLayout = $this->themeLayout->reset()->load($layoutId);
1322        
1323        if (!$widgetLayout->getLayoutId()) {
1324            return $this->fetchJson([
1325                'success' => false,
1326                'message' => __('部件不存在'),
1327            ]);
1328        }
1329        
1330        $widgetModule = $widgetLayout->getData('widget_module');
1331        $widgetCode = $widgetLayout->getData('widget_code');
1332        $widgetType = $widgetLayout->getData('widget_type') ?: '';
1333        $area = $widgetLayout->getData('area') ?: 'frontend';
1334        
1335        try {
1336            // 获取参数定义以识别可翻译路径
1337            $eventData = [
1338                'data' => [
1339                    'operation' => 'getParamDefinitions',
1340                    'params' => [
1341                        'widget_module' => $widgetModule,
1342                        'widget_code' => $widgetCode,
1343                        'area' => $area,
1344                    ],
1345                ],
1346            ];
1347            $this->getEventManager()->dispatch('Weline_Widget::query', $eventData);
1348            $paramDefs = $eventData['data']['result'] ?? [];
1349            if (!is_array($paramDefs)) {
1350                $paramDefs = [];
1351            }
1352
1353            $identify = $this->resolveThemeConfigIdentify($widgetModule, $widgetType, $widgetCode, $area);
1354
1355            // 分离路径 key（如 slides.0.title）与普通 key，同时写入翻译存储
1356            $normalConfig = ThemeData::saveTranslatablePaths($configData, $paramDefs, $identify, $locale);
1357
1358            if ($locale === null) {
1359                // 默认语言：将完整普通 config 写入 m_theme_layout.config
1360                $widgetLayout->setData('config', json_encode($normalConfig));
1361                $widgetLayout->save();
1362
1363                // 普通（非路径、非翻译）参数也写入 ThemeData 以保持兼容
1364                $this->persistThemeDefaultConfig($widgetModule, $widgetType, $widgetCode, $normalConfig, null, $area);
1365            } else {
1366                // 特定语言：只写翻译层（普通可翻译字段）
1367                $this->persistThemeDefaultConfig($widgetModule, $widgetType, $widgetCode, $normalConfig, $locale, $area);
1368            }
1369
1370            return $this->fetchJson([
1371                'success' => true,
1372                'message' => $locale ? __('已保存 %{locale} 语言的配置', ['locale' => $locale]) : __('配置已保存'),
1373            ]);
1374        } catch (\Exception $e) {
1375            return $this->fetchJson([
1376                'success' => false,
1377                'message' => __('保存失败：%{error}', ['error' => $e->getMessage()]),
1378            ]);
1379        }
1380    }
1381
1382    /**
1383     * 编译布局模板 (GET) - 返回编译后的带插槽标记的 HTML
1384     * 
1385     * 用于可视化编辑器加载编译后的页面
1386     */
1387    public function getCompileLayout()
1388    {
1389        $previewContextService = $this->getPreviewContextService();
1390        $editorArea = $previewContextService->normalizeArea(
1391            (string)$this->request->getParam('editor_area', PreviewContextService::AREA_FRONTEND)
1392        );
1393        $layoutType = (string)$this->request->getParam('layout_type', 'homepage');
1394        $layoutOption = (string)$this->request->getParam('layout_option', 'default');
1395        $context = $this->persistEditorContext([
1396            'frontend_theme_id' => (int)$this->request->getParam('frontend_theme_id', 0),
1397            'backend_theme_id' => (int)$this->request->getParam('backend_theme_id', 0),
1398            'editor_area' => $editorArea,
1399            'shell' => PreviewContextService::SHELL_THEME_EDITOR,
1400            'preview_mode' => (string)$this->request->getParam('preview_mode', PreviewContextService::DEFAULT_PREVIEW_MODE),
1401            'status' => (string)$this->request->getParam('status', PreviewContextService::DEFAULT_STATUS),
1402            'version_id' => (int)$this->request->getParam('version_id', 0) ?: null,
1403            'scope' => (string)$this->request->getParam('scope', PreviewContextService::DEFAULT_SCOPE),
1404            'target_type' => PreviewContextService::TARGET_TYPE_LAYOUT,
1405            'target_value' => $layoutType,
1406        ]);
1407        $themeId = $previewContextService->getThemeIdForArea($editorArea, $context, true);
1408
1409        if (!$themeId) {
1410            return $this->fetchJson([
1411                'success' => false,
1412                'message' => __('Missing theme ID'),
1413            ]);
1414        }
1415
1416        $session = \Weline\Framework\Manager\ObjectManager::getInstance(\Weline\Framework\Session\Session::class);
1417        $session->setData('preview_theme_id', $themeId);
1418        $session->setData('preview_theme_area', $editorArea);
1419
1420        try {
1421            $this->welineTheme->load($themeId);
1422            if (!$this->welineTheme->getId()) {
1423                return $this->fetchJson([
1424                    'success' => false,
1425                    'message' => __('Theme not found'),
1426                ]);
1427            }
1428
1429            $templatePath = "Weline_Theme::theme/{$editorArea}/layouts/{$layoutType}/{$layoutOption}.phtml";
1430            $this->assign('editor_mode', true);
1431            $this->assign('theme_id', $themeId);
1432            $this->assign('layout_type', $layoutType);
1433            $this->assign('preview_context', $context);
1434            $this->assign('meta', [
1435                'showHeader' => true,
1436                'showFooter' => true,
1437                'showStatistics' => true,
1438                'showFeatures' => true,
1439                'showProducts' => true,
1440                'showTestimonials' => true,
1441                'showNews' => true,
1442                'showPartners' => true,
1443            ]);
1444
1445            $html = $this->fetchTagHtml($templatePath);
1446            $slots = $this->extractSlots($html);
1447
1448            return $this->fetchJson([
1449                'success' => true,
1450                'html' => $html,
1451                'slots' => $slots,
1452                'layout' => [
1453                    'type' => $layoutType,
1454                    'option' => $layoutOption,
1455                ],
1456                'context' => $context,
1457            ]);
1458        } catch (\Exception $e) {
1459            return $this->fetchJson([
1460                'success' => false,
1461                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
1462            ]);
1463        }
1464    }
1465
1466    public function legacyGetCompileLayout()
1467    {
1468        return $this->getCompileLayout();
1469    }
1470/*
1471        $themeId = (int)$this->request->getParam('theme_id');
1472        $layoutType = $this->request->getParam('layout_type', 'homepage');
1473        $layoutOption = $this->request->getParam('layout_option', 'default');
1474
1475        if (!$themeId) {
1476            return $this->fetchJson([
1477                'success' => false,
1478                'message' => __('缺少主题ID'),
1479            ]);
1480        }
1481
1482        // 设置预览主题到 session，让 TemplateFetchFile Observer 能识别当前编辑的主题
1483        // 注意：必须使用 ObjectManager::getInstance(Session::class) 与 Observer 保持一致
1484        $session = \Weline\Framework\Manager\ObjectManager::getInstance(\Weline\Framework\Session\Session::class);
1485        $session->setData('preview_theme_id', $themeId);
1486        $session->setData('preview_theme_area', 'frontend');
1487
1488        try {
1489            // 获取主题信息
1490            $this->welineTheme->load($themeId);
1491            if (!$this->welineTheme->getId()) {
1492                return $this->fetchJson([
1493                    'success' => false,
1494                    'message' => __('主题不存在'),
1495                ]);
1496            }
1497
1498            // 构建布局模板路径
1499            $templatePath = "Weline_Theme::theme/frontend/layouts/{$layoutType}/{$layoutOption}.phtml";
1500
1501            // 编译模板并获取 HTML
1502            // 设置编辑模式标记
1503            $this->assign('editor_mode', true);
1504            $this->assign('theme_id', $themeId);
1505            $this->assign('layout_type', $layoutType);
1506            $this->assign('meta', [
1507                'showHeader' => true,
1508                'showFooter' => true,
1509                'showStatistics' => true,
1510                'showFeatures' => true,
1511                'showProducts' => true,
1512                'showTestimonials' => true,
1513                'showNews' => true,
1514                'showPartners' => true,
1515            ]);
1516
1517            $html = $this->fetchTagHtml($templatePath);
1518
1519            // 提取所有插槽信息
1520            $slots = $this->extractSlots($html);
1521
1522            return $this->fetchJson([
1523                'success' => true,
1524                'html' => $html,
1525                'slots' => $slots,
1526                'layout' => [
1527                    'type' => $layoutType,
1528                    'option' => $layoutOption,
1529                ],
1530            ]);
1531        } catch (\Exception $e) {
1532            return $this->fetchJson([
1533                'success' => false,
1534                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
1535            ]);
1536        }
1537    }
1538
1539    /**
1540     * 从 HTML 中提取插槽信息
1541     * 同时支持旧格式（widget-slot-area + data-slot-id）和新格式（data-wslot），
1542     * 否则 footer/header 等仅使用 data-wslot 的插槽不会被返回，导致 footer 布局异常。
1543     */
1544    private function extractSlots(string $html): array
1545    {
1546        $slots = [];
1547
1548        // 1. 新格式：data-wslot（header、footer 及子插槽 footer-links 等均用此格式）
1549        if (strpos($html, 'data-wslot') !== false) {
1550            $doc = new \DOMDocument();
1551            libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
1552            $htmlForDom = mb_convert_encoding($html, 'HTML-ENTITIES', 'UTF-8');
1553            @$doc->loadHTML($htmlForDom, LIBXML_HTML_NOIMPLIED | LIBXML_HTML_NODEFDTD);
1554            libxml_clear_errors();
1555            $xpath = new \DOMXPath($doc);
1556            foreach ($xpath->query("//*[@data-wslot]") ?: [] as $element) {
1557                if (!$element instanceof \DOMElement) {
1558                    continue;
1559                }
1560                $slotId = $element->getAttribute('data-wslot');
1561                if ($slotId === '') {
1562                    continue;
1563                }
1564                $acceptAttr = $element->getAttribute('data-wslot-accept') ?: $element->getAttribute('data-slot-accept') ?: '';
1565                $slots[$slotId] = [
1566                    'id' => $slotId,
1567                    'name' => $element->getAttribute('data-wslot-name') ?: $element->getAttribute('data-slot-name') ?: $slotId,
1568                    'accept' => array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $acceptAttr)))),
1569                    'exclusive' => ($element->getAttribute('data-wslot-exclusive') ?: $element->getAttribute('data-slot-exclusive')) === 'true',
1570                    'multiple' => ($element->getAttribute('data-wslot-multiple') ?: $element->getAttribute('data-slot-multiple')) !== 'false',
1571                    'position' => $element->getAttribute('data-wslot-position') ?: $element->getAttribute('data-slot-position') ?: '',
1572                ];
1573            }
1574        }
1575
1576        // 2. 旧格式：widget-slot-area + data-slot-id（不覆盖已从 data-wslot 提取的插槽）
1577        $pattern = '/<[^>]+class="[^"]*widget-slot-area[^"]*"[^>]*data-slot-id="([^"]+)"[^>]*>/i';
1578        if (preg_match_all($pattern, $html, $matches, PREG_SET_ORDER)) {
1579            foreach ($matches as $match) {
1580                $fullTag = $match[0];
1581                $slotId = $match[1];
1582                if (isset($slots[$slotId])) {
1583                    continue;
1584                }
1585                $slot = ['id' => $slotId];
1586                if (preg_match('/data-slot-name="([^"]+)"/', $fullTag, $m)) {
1587                    $slot['name'] = $m[1];
1588                }
1589                if (preg_match('/data-slot-accept="([^"]+)"/', $fullTag, $m)) {
1590                    $slot['accept'] = array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $m[1]))));
1591                } else {
1592                    $slot['accept'] = [];
1593                }
1594                if (preg_match('/data-slot-position="([^"]+)"/', $fullTag, $m)) {
1595                    $slot['position'] = $m[1];
1596                }
1597                if (preg_match('/data-slot-multiple="([^"]+)"/', $fullTag, $m)) {
1598                    $slot['multiple'] = $m[1] === 'true';
1599                }
1600                $slots[$slotId] = $slot;
1601            }
1602        }
1603
1604        return $slots;
1605    }
1606
1607    /**
1608     * 为部件库预编译预览 HTML
1609     */
1610    private function attachWidgetPreviewHtml(array $availableWidgets): array
1611    {
1612        foreach ($availableWidgets as $type => &$group) {
1613            if (empty($group['widgets']) || !is_array($group['widgets'])) {
1614                continue;
1615            }
1616            foreach ($group['widgets'] as &$widget) {
1617                if (!is_array($widget)) {
1618                    continue;
1619                }
1620                $widget['preview_html'] = $this->buildWidgetPreviewHtml($widget);
1621            }
1622        }
1623
1624        return $availableWidgets;
1625    }
1626
1627    /**
1628     * 使用默认参数渲染部件预览 HTML
1629     */
1630    private function buildWidgetPreviewHtml(array $widget): string
1631    {
1632        $widgetModule = (string)($widget['module'] ?? $widget['widget_module'] ?? '');
1633        $widgetType = (string)($widget['type'] ?? $widget['widget_type'] ?? '');
1634        $widgetCode = (string)($widget['code'] ?? $widget['widget_code'] ?? '');
1635        if ($widgetModule === 'Weline_Theme' && ($widgetType === 'theme_component' || str_contains($widgetCode, '/'))) {
1636            /** @var \Weline\Theme\Service\ThemePlaceableRegistry $placeableRegistry */
1637            $placeableRegistry = ObjectManager::getInstance(\Weline\Theme\Service\ThemePlaceableRegistry::class);
1638            $html = $placeableRegistry->renderPreview('Weline_Theme', 'theme_component', $widgetCode, [], null, 'frontend');
1639            if ($html !== '') {
1640                return $this->sanitizeWidgetPreviewHtml($html);
1641            }
1642        }
1643
1644        $template = $widget['template'] ?? '';
1645        if (!$template) {
1646            $name = $widget['name'] ?? $widget['code'] ?? '';
1647            return '<div class="widget-preview-placeholder">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$name) . '</div>';
1648        }
1649
1650        $defaultConfig = [];
1651        foreach ($widget['params'] ?? [] as $key => $param) {
1652            if (!is_array($param)) {
1653                continue;
1654            }
1655            $defaultValue = $param['default'] ?? '';
1656            if (($key === 'end_date' || $key === 'countdown_end') && empty($defaultValue)) {
1657                $defaultValue = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() + 86400);
1658            }
1659            $defaultConfig[$key] = $defaultValue;
1660        }
1661        $defaultConfig['preview_mode'] = true;
1662
1663        try {
1664            $templateObj = $this->getTemplate();
1665            // WLS 下 Template 单例 _data 会跨请求残留，渲染前清空，避免上一部件数据污染当前预览
1666            $templateObj->unsetData();
1667            $html = $templateObj->fetchHtml($template, $defaultConfig);
1668            return $this->sanitizeWidgetPreviewHtml(is_string($html) ? $html : '');
1669        } catch (\Exception $e) {
1670            return '<div class="widget-preview-error">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$e->getMessage()) . '</div>';
1671        }
1672    }
1673
1674    /**
1675     * 根据插槽名或部件类型推断实际所属区域
1676     * 
1677     * @param string $slotOrArea 插槽名或区域名
1678     * @param string $widgetType 部件类型
1679     * @param string $widgetCode 部件代码
1680     * @return string 推断的区域代码
1681     */
1682    private function inferAreaFromSlot(string $slotOrArea, string $widgetType = '', string $widgetCode = ''): string
1683    {
1684        // Header 相关的插槽名
1685        $headerSlots = [
1686            'logo', 'search', 'main-nav', 'user-area', 'cart', 'language', 'currency',
1687            'header-left', 'header-center', 'header-right', 'header-container',
1688            'top-bar', 'top-bar-left', 'top-bar-right', 'navigation',
1689        ];
1690        
1691        // Footer 相关的插槽名
1692        $footerSlots = [
1693            'footer-left', 'footer-center', 'footer-right', 'footer-container',
1694            'footer-links', 'footer-social', 'copyright', 'footer-newsletter',
1695        ];
1696        
1697        // 检查插槽名是否匹配 header 区域
1698        $slotLower = strtolower($slotOrArea);
1699        foreach ($headerSlots as $hs) {
1700            if ($slotLower === $hs || str_contains($slotLower, 'header') || str_starts_with($slotLower, 'top-')) {
1701                return ThemeLayout::AREA_HEADER;
1702            }
1703        }
1704        if (in_array($slotLower, $headerSlots, true)) {
1705            return ThemeLayout::AREA_HEADER;
1706        }
1707        
1708        // 检查插槽名是否匹配 footer 区域
1709        foreach ($footerSlots as $fs) {
1710            if ($slotLower === $fs || str_contains($slotLower, 'footer') || $slotLower === 'copyright') {
1711                return ThemeLayout::AREA_FOOTER;
1712            }
1713        }
1714        if (in_array($slotLower, $footerSlots, true)) {
1715            return ThemeLayout::AREA_FOOTER;
1716        }
1717        
1718        // 根据部件类型推断
1719        $headerTypes = ['header', 'navigation', 'search', 'logo', 'cart', 'language', 'currency'];
1720        $footerTypes = ['footer', 'social', 'newsletter', 'copyright'];
1721        
1722        $typeLower = strtolower($widgetType);
1723        $codeLower = strtolower($widgetCode);
1724        
1725        foreach ($headerTypes as $ht) {
1726            if (str_contains($typeLower, $ht) || str_contains($codeLower, $ht)) {
1727                return ThemeLayout::AREA_HEADER;
1728            }
1729        }
1730        
1731        foreach ($footerTypes as $ft) {
1732            if (str_contains($typeLower, $ft) || str_contains($codeLower, $ft)) {
1733                return ThemeLayout::AREA_FOOTER;
1734            }
1735        }
1736        
1737        // 默认归到 content 区域
1738        return ThemeLayout::AREA_CONTENT;
1739    }
1740
1741    /**
1742     * 根据布局ID和配置构建预览 HTML（用于配置保存后返回）
1743     * 
1744     * @param int $layoutId 布局ID
1745     * @param array $config 部件配置（可选，未提供则从数据库获取）
1746     * @return string|null 预览 HTML，失败返回 null
1747     */
1748    private function buildPreviewHtmlForLayoutId(int $layoutId, array $config = []): ?string
1749    {
1750        // 获取部件信息
1751        $layoutData = $this->layoutService->getWidgetByLayoutId($layoutId);
1752        if (!$layoutData) {
1753            return null;
1754        }
1755
1756        $widgetModule = $layoutData['widget_module'] ?? '';
1757        $widgetCode = $layoutData['widget_code'] ?? '';
1758
1759        if (!$widgetModule || !$widgetCode) {
1760            return null;
1761        }
1762
1763        $eventData = [
1764            'data' => [
1765                'operation' => 'preview',
1766                'params' => [
1767                    'widget_module' => $widgetModule,
1768                    'widget_code' => $widgetCode,
1769                    'config' => array_merge($layoutData['config'] ?? [], $config),
1770                    'area' => 'frontend',
1771                ],
1772            ],
1773        ];
1774        $this->getEventManager()->dispatch('Weline_Widget::query', $eventData);
1775        $html = $eventData['data']['result'] ?? null;
1776        $err = $eventData['data']['error'] ?? null;
1777        if ($err !== null && $err !== '') {
1778            return '<div class="widget-preview-error">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$err) . '</div>';
1779        }
1780        return is_string($html) ? $html : '<div class="widget-preview-placeholder">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$widgetCode) . '</div>';
1781    }
1782
1783    /**
1784     * 按 module + code 从注册表查找部件元数据
1785     */
1786    private function findWidgetMetaByModuleAndCode(string $widgetModule, string $widgetCode): ?array
1787    {
1788        $registry = $this->widgetRegistry->getRegistry();
1789        foreach ($registry as $type => $typeWidgets) {
1790            if (!is_array($typeWidgets)) {
1791                continue;
1792            }
1793            foreach ($typeWidgets as $code => $widget) {
1794                if (!is_array($widget)) {
1795                    continue;
1796                }
1797                if (($widget['module'] ?? '') === $widgetModule && ($widget['code'] ?? '') === $widgetCode) {
1798                    return $widget;
1799                }
1800            }
1801        }
1802
1803        if ($widgetModule === 'Weline_Theme' && str_contains($widgetCode, '/')) {
1804            /** @var \Weline\Theme\Service\ThemePlaceableRegistry $placeableRegistry */
1805            $placeableRegistry = ObjectManager::getInstance(\Weline\Theme\Service\ThemePlaceableRegistry::class);
1806            $definition = $placeableRegistry->find($widgetModule, 'theme_component', $widgetCode, null, 'frontend');
1807            if ($definition) {
1808                return $definition->toWidgetArray();
1809            }
1810        }
1811
1812        return null;
1813    }
1814
1815    private function resolveThemeConfigIdentify(string $widgetModule, string $widgetType, string $widgetCode, string $area): string
1816    {
1817        if ($widgetModule === 'Weline_Theme' && ($widgetType === 'theme_component' || str_contains($widgetCode, '/'))) {
1818            /** @var ThemePlaceableRegistry $placeableRegistry */
1819            $placeableRegistry = ObjectManager::getInstance(ThemePlaceableRegistry::class);
1820            $definition = $placeableRegistry->find($widgetModule, 'theme_component', $widgetCode, null, $area);
1821            if ($definition) {
1822                return $definition->getMetaIdentify();
1823            }
1824        }
1825
1826        return ThemeData::getWidgetIdentify($widgetModule, $widgetCode, $area);
1827    }
1828
1829    private function persistThemeDefaultConfig(string $widgetModule, string $widgetType, string $widgetCode, array $config, ?string $locale, string $area): void
1830    {
1831        if ($widgetModule === 'Weline_Theme' && ($widgetType === 'theme_component' || str_contains($widgetCode, '/'))) {
1832            ThemeData::setParamValues(
1833                $this->resolveThemeConfigIdentify($widgetModule, $widgetType, $widgetCode, $area),
1834                $config,
1835                'default',
1836                $locale
1837            );
1838            return;
1839        }
1840
1841        ThemeData::setWidgetParams($widgetModule, $widgetCode, $config, $locale, $area);
1842    }
1843
1844    /**
1845     * 预览用 HTML 清理：移除脚本与内联事件，防止弹窗等副作用
1846     */
1847    private function sanitizeWidgetPreviewHtml(string $html): string
1848    {
1849        if (trim($html) === '') {
1850            return $html;
1851        }
1852
1853        $doc = new \DOMDocument('1.0', 'UTF-8');
1854        $prev = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
1855
1856        $wrappedHtml = '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"></head><body>' . $html . '</body></html>';
1857        if (function_exists('mb_encode_numericentity')) {
1858            $wrappedHtml = mb_encode_numericentity(
1859                $wrappedHtml,
1860                [0x80, 0x10FFFF, 0, 0xFFFF],
1861                'UTF-8'
1862            );
1863        }
1864        $doc->loadHTML($wrappedHtml, LIBXML_HTML_NOIMPLIED | LIBXML_HTML_NODEFDTD);
1865
1866        $xpath = new \DOMXPath($doc);
1867
1868        // 移除所有脚本
1869        foreach ($xpath->query('//script') as $script) {
1870            $script->parentNode?->removeChild($script);
1871        }
1872
1873        // 移除所有 iframe（避免 html2canvas 触发 layout-preview 请求）
1874        foreach ($xpath->query('//iframe') as $iframe) {
1875            $iframe->parentNode?->removeChild($iframe);
1876        }
1877
1878        // 移除所有指向 layout-preview 的链接和图片
1879        foreach ($xpath->query('//a[@href] | //img[@src]') as $element) {
1880            $href = $element->getAttribute('href');
1881            $src = $element->getAttribute('src');
1882            if (($href && strpos($href, 'layout-preview') !== false) ||
1883                ($src && strpos($src, 'layout-preview') !== false)) {
1884                $element->parentNode?->removeChild($element);
1885            }
1886        }
1887
1888        // 移除所有内联事件（onclick/onload/...）
1889        foreach ($xpath->query('//*') as $node) {
1890            if (!$node->hasAttributes()) {
1891                continue;
1892            }
1893            $toRemove = [];
1894            foreach ($node->attributes as $attr) {
1895                if (stripos($attr->name, 'on') === 0) {
1896                    $toRemove[] = $attr->name;
1897                }
1898            }
1899            foreach ($toRemove as $attrName) {
1900                $node->removeAttribute($attrName);
1901            }
1902        }
1903
1904        $body = $doc->getElementsByTagName('body')->item(0);
1905        $cleanHtml = '';
1906        if ($body) {
1907            foreach ($body->childNodes as $child) {
1908                $cleanHtml .= $doc->saveHTML($child);
1909            }
1910        }
1911
1912        libxml_clear_errors();
1913        libxml_use_internal_errors($prev);
1914
1915        return $cleanHtml;
1916    }
1917
1918    /**
1919     * 保存编译后的布局 (POST) - 将部件内容填充到插槽生成最终页面
1920     */
1921    public function postSaveCompiledLayout()
1922    {
1923        $bodyParams = $this->request->getBodyParams();
1924        if (is_string($bodyParams)) {
1925            $data = json_decode($bodyParams, true);
1926            if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
1927                $data = $this->request->getParams();
1928            }
1929        } elseif (is_array($bodyParams) && !empty($bodyParams)) {
1930            $data = $bodyParams;
1931        } else {
1932            $data = $this->request->getParams();
1933        }
1934
1935        $themeId = (int)($data['theme_id'] ?? 0);
1936        $layoutType = $data['layout_type'] ?? 'homepage';
1937        $layoutOption = $data['layout_option'] ?? 'default';
1938        $slotContents = $data['slot_contents'] ?? []; // 各插槽的部件内容
1939
1940        if (!$themeId) {
1941            return $this->fetchJson([
1942                'success' => false,
1943                'message' => __('缺少主题ID'),
1944            ]);
1945        }
1946
1947        // 设置预览主题到 session，让 TemplateFetchFile Observer 能识别当前编辑的主题
1948        // 注意：必须使用 ObjectManager::getInstance(Session::class) 与 Observer 保持一致
1949        $session = \Weline\Framework\Manager\ObjectManager::getInstance(\Weline\Framework\Session\Session::class);
1950        $session->setData('preview_theme_id', $themeId);
1951        $session->setData('preview_theme_area', 'frontend');
1952
1953        try {
1954            // 获取原始编译后的 HTML
1955            $templatePath = "Weline_Theme::theme/frontend/layouts/{$layoutType}/{$layoutOption}.phtml";
1956            
1957            $this->assign('editor_mode', false);
1958            $this->assign('theme_id', $themeId);
1959            $this->assign('layout_type', $layoutType);
1960            
1961            // 设置 meta 数据，包含插槽内容
1962            $meta = [
1963                'showHeader' => true,
1964                'showFooter' => true,
1965            ];
1966            
1967            // 将插槽内容注入 meta
1968            foreach ($slotContents as $slotId => $content) {
1969                $meta[$slotId] = $content;
1970            }
1971            
1972            $this->assign('meta', $meta);
1973            
1974            $html = $this->fetchTagHtml($templatePath);
1975
1976            // 保存到生成目录
1977            $savePath = $this->cacheGenerator->saveCompiledLayout(
1978                $themeId,
1979                $layoutType,
1980                $layoutOption,
1981                $html
1982            );
1983
1984            return $this->fetchJson([
1985                'success' => true,
1986                'message' => __('布局已保存'),
1987                'path' => $savePath,
1988            ]);
